title: NVIDIA GPU Operator
description: NVIDIA GPU Operator documents installation material for NVIDIA GPU Operator in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the cluster-addon class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Install, Driver CRD, Upgrade Impact, and Uninstall, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include gpu-operator, nvidia, nvidia-gpu-operator, install, and infrastructure, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / device / nvidia-gpu-operator / install, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
